allow: Bash(python -c "import os; from PIL import Image; d='public/images/travels/japan-24'; [print\(f, Image.open\(os.path.join\(d,f\)\).size\) for f in sorted\(os.listdir\(d\)\)]")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\),p='public/images/travels/japan-24';for\(const f of fs.readdirSync\(p\)\){const b=fs.readFileSync\(p+'/'+f\);let w,h;if\(f.endsWith\('.png'\)\){w=b.readUInt32BE\(16\);h=b.readUInt32BE\(20\);}else if\(f.endsWith\('.jpg'\)||f.endsWith\('.jpeg'\)\){let i=2;while\(i<b.length\){if\(b[i]!==0xff\)break;const m=b[i+1];const len=b.readUInt16BE\(i+2\);if\(m>=0xc0&&m<=0xcf&&m!==0xc4&&m!==0xc8\){h=b.readUInt16BE\(i+5\);w=b.readUInt16BE\(i+7\);break;}i+=2+len;}}console.log\(f,w+'x'+h\);}")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/travels/japan-24.json'\); const s = d.small || []; console.log\('items:', s.length\); s.forEach\(i => { const right = \(i.x||0\) + \(i.w||0\); if \(right > 100 || \(i.x||0\) < 0\) console.log\(i.id, 'x:', i.x, 'w:', i.w, 'right:', right\); }\);")
